'''Sulituans''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] with nautilus-like heads and shells with long tentacles that served as arms and legs. They lived on [[Archae Teuthis]]. The [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] [[Tzidik Wrantojo]] was a Sulituan.

{{Species-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
"Sulituan" is "nautilus" spelled backward, letter for letter. "Architeuthis" is the genus name of the Giant Squid.
